reference: I have a rash that started about two months ago on my chin, and now it's spreading around my mouth. I have not changed anything in my diet, facial creams, or medications. The only thing that has changed is that I stopped taking my St. John's Wort. I am twenty-nine years old, five feet seven inches tall, and white.
text: I had a rash that started about two months ago, and now it's spreading around my mouth. I have not changed anything in my diet, facial creams, or medications. The only thing that has changed is that I stopped taking my St. John's wort. I am 29 years old, 5 feet 7 inches tall, and white.
